title: Sports coaches, instructors and officials
description: Represent and promote artists, performers, and athletes in dealings with current or prospective employers. May handle contract negotiation and other business matters for clients. Prepare cost estimates for product manufacturing, construction projects, or services to aid management in bidding on or determining price of product or service. May specialize according to particular service performed or type of product manufactured. Analyze and coordinate the schedule, timeline, procurement, staffing, and budget of a product or service on a per project basis. Lead and guide the work of technical staff. May serve as a point of contact for the client or customer. (Based on 24 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Arrange and conduct sports-related activities, such as training camps, skill-improvement courses, clinics, and pre-season try-outs. Develop and arrange competition schedules and programs. Organize and conduct competitions and tournaments. Teach individual and team sports to participants through instruction and demonstration. Plan, organize, and conduct practice sessions. Lead and guide the work of technical staff.

Inspect sporting equipment or examine participants to ensure compliance with event and safety regulations. Monitor athletes' use of equipment to ensure safe and proper use. Explain and enforce safety rules and regulations governing sports, recreational activities, and the use of exercise equipment. Inspect game sites for compliance with regulations or safety requirements. Observe participants and inform them of corrective measures necessary for skill improvement.

Keep abreast of changing rules, techniques, technologies, and philosophies relevant to their sport. Explain and teach sports rules, game strategies, and performance principles, such as specific ways of moving the body. Analyze the strengths and weaknesses of opposing teams to develop game strategies. Adjust coaching techniques based on the strengths and weaknesses of athletes. Evaluate athletes' skills and review performance records to determine their fitness and potential in a particular area of athletics.

Serve as organizer, leader, instructor, or referee for outdoor and indoor games, such as volleyball, football, and soccer. Officiate at sporting events, games, or competitions, to maintain standards of play and to ensure that game rules are observed. Judge performances in sporting competitions to award points, impose scoring penalties, and determine results. Signal participants or other officials to make them aware of infractions or to otherwise regulate play or competition.

Instruct individuals or groups in maintaining exertion levels to maximize benefits from exercise routines. Provide training direction, encouragement, motivation, and nutritional advice to prepare athletes for games, competitive events, or tours. Counsel student athletes on academic, athletic, and personal issues. Teach students proper breathing techniques used during physical exertion. Maintain fitness equipment and monitor participants' progress, adapting programs as needed.

Collaborate with physicians to develop and implement comprehensive rehabilitation programs for athletic injuries. Teach and instruct coaches about the care and prevention of athletic injuries. Conduct an initial assessment of an athlete's injury or illness to provide emergency or continued care. Apply protective or injury-preventive devices, such as tape, bandages, or braces, to body parts. Administer emergency first aid, wrap injuries, treat minor chronic disabilities, or refer injured persons to physicians.

Monitor the academic eligibility of student athletes. Keep and review paper, computerized, and video records of athlete, team, and opposing team performance. Assess cost-effectiveness of products, projects or services, tracking actual costs relative to bids as the project develops. Review instructional content, methods, and student evaluations to assess strengths and weaknesses.

Prepare instructional program objectives, outlines, and lesson plans. Prepare and administer written, oral, and performance tests, and issue grades in accordance with performance. Establish clear objectives for lessons and communicate those objectives to students. Adapt teaching methods and instructional materials to meet students' varying needs and interests. Monitor students' performance to suggest improvements and ensure they satisfy course standards and objectives.

Attend professional meetings, conferences, and workshops to maintain and improve professional competence. Maintain accurate and complete student records as required by administrative policy. Engage in general administrative tasks, such as keeping records or writing reports. Prepare materials and classrooms for class activities. Meet with other instructors, teachers, and parents to discuss student progress.

Travel with athletic teams to be available at sporting events. Coordinate travel arrangements and travel with the team to away contests. Identify and recruit potential athletes through meetings and recruitment letters.

Compile scores and other athletic records. Verify scoring calculations before competition winners are announced. Keep track of event times, including race times and elapsed time during game segments. Direct participants to assigned areas, such as starting blocks or penalty areas.

Conduct classes, workshops, and demonstrations, and provide individual instruction to teach topics and skills, such as physical fitness, personal finance, and more. Provide application or analytical support to researchers or traders on issues such as valuations or data. Perform general team support duties, such as running errands, maintaining equipment, or stocking supplies, and promote health clubs through membership sales.

Perform team support duties, such as running errands, maintaining equipment, or stocking supplies. Promote health clubs through membership sales, and record member information. Conduct therapeutic, recreational, or athletic activities. Assist in treating athletic injuries and advising athletes on proper equipment use.

Verify credentials of participants in sporting events, and make other qualifying determinations, such as starting order or handicap number. Research and study players and teams to anticipate issues that might arise in future engagements. Obtaining and serving subpoenas and filing athlete insurance claims are unrelated activities.
Confer with clients to develop strategies for their careers, negotiate contractual rights and obligations, and explain actions taken on their behalf.

Send samples of clients' work and other promotional material to potential employers to obtain auditions, sponsorships, or endorsement deals, and schedule promotional or performance engagements for clients.
Conduct auditions or interviews to evaluate potential clients and interview witnesses or suspects to identify persons responsible for security breaches or to establish losses.
Maintain assigned account bases while developing new accounts, and gather all relevant material for bid processes, including coordinating bidding and contract approval.
Document all investigative activities and prepare documentation for case reports or court proceedings.
Develop contacts with individuals and organizations, apply effective strategies and techniques to ensure their clients' success, and keep informed of industry trends and deals.
Prepare promotional plans, sales literature, media kits, and sales contracts, using computer; create, manage, or automate orders or invoices, using order management or invoicing software.
Negotiate with managers, promoters, union officials, and other persons regarding clients' contractual rights and obligations, and confer with clients to explain actions taken on their behalf.

Prepare cost estimates for current or future projects, collect historical cost data to estimate costs, and analyze blueprints and other documentation to prepare time, cost, materials, and labor estimates.

Analyze financial data to detect irregularities in areas such as billing trends, financial relationships, and regulatory compliance procedures, and conduct in-depth investigations of suspicious activity.
Create and maintain logs, records, or databases of information about clients' activities, including documenting promotional engagements and maintaining records of client accounts.
Collect fees, commissions, or other payments according to contract terms, and inform customers of available options for advertisement artwork, and provide samples.

Monitor or track sustainability indicators, such as energy usage, natural resource usage, waste generation, and recycling, and develop sustainability project goals, objectives, initiatives, or strategies in collaboration with other professionals.
Compose product descriptions for online storefronts and advertisements, and prepare or organize marketing materials to optimize content for search engine criteria.
Purchase new or used items from various sources for resale via an online or physical retail platform.
Receive and process payments from customers using electronic transaction services, and correspond with online customers to address inquiries or complaints regarding products or services.
Review and revise sustainability proposals or policies, and analyze corporate intelligence data to identify trends or threats to security.
Develop emergency management plans for recovery decision making, ensuring continuity of critical processes and effective communication during disruptions.
Create business continuity and disaster recovery budgets, and develop disaster recovery plans for physical locations with critical assets.
Monitor and analyze website usage data to maximize search engine visibility and improve customer experience.
Direct and supervise employees engaged in sales and inventory processes, ensuring quality service and adherence to organizational policies.
Recruit, hire, and train staff members, while providing assistance and evaluating personnel to ensure performance and compliance with set standards.
Attend professional meetings and engage in training to stay updated with industry trends and developments.
Investigate employee complaints and resolve issues while informing management about problems such as disputes or operational changes.
Inspect work areas or operating equipment to ensure compliance with established standards in cleanliness and maintenance.
Analyze opportunities for strategic improvement or risk mitigation caused by business or regulatory changes.
Develop or revise business plans for e-commerce, focusing on product lines, pricing, inventory, and marketing strategies.
Keep and manage records pertaining to purchases and sales, ensuring an organized inventory and compliance with policies.
Observe and evaluate the performance and appearance of workers to ensure quality service.
Implement security practices to protect assets and ensure customer privacy during transactions and online operations.
Establish methods to monitor and evaluate service interruptions, and recommend solutions for operational compliance and efficiency.
Train staff in proper operational procedures and explain company policies to maintain quality and compliance standards.
Prepare reports summarizing operational results, financial performance, and effectiveness of initiatives, including sustainability efforts.
